## Greenwood Capital Discloses $5.06M Position in Marvell Technology

No actionable signal; routine 13F disclosure. File and discard.

- Greenwood Capital Associates reported a $5.06 million stock position in Marvell Technology (MRVL) via a 13F filing.
- This is a routine institutional position disclosure; no operational or financial catalyst for MRVL.
- Position size is modest and carries no actionable thesis signal.
- Low classifier confidence; flagged as routine.
